---
title: "About Me"
sidebar: false 
---

# Education

-   B.S., Physics, Middle East Technical University, Turkey, 2017 - 2022, quitted
-   A.S., Bilgisayar Programcılığı, Atatürk Üniversitesi, 2020-2022
-   B.S., Industrial Engineering, Hacettepe University, Turkey, 2022 - ongoing.

# Work Experience

## Employements

1.  The Ministry of Industry and Technology of The Republic of Türkiye, Office Personnel, May 2024 - ongoing

## Internships

Unfortunately, this section has to stay empty for now :/

# Projects

Unfortunately, this section has to stay empty for now :/

# Competencies

R, Quarto, Git, Python

# Hobbies

Playing games and reading books
